page: Amazon Web Services m6id.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores based on the x86_64 Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 512 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing a balanced 4 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes 7600 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the m6id.32xlarge demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core tests and PassMark CPU scores, including encryption and extended instruction tests. Memory bandwidth is strong, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 6671.69 GB/sec and large block uncached speeds at 333.37 GB/sec. Single-core performance, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores, falls in the average tier. The instance also shows strong capabilities in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput.

Given its high resource density, including a substantial 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and 128 dedicated vCPUs, the instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high-speed local storage and massive parallel processing without the overhead of external storage. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, data-intensive applications, software compilation, static web serving, and multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services m6id.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. It includes 512 GB of DDR4 RAM and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor. The instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for multi-core stress-ng and PassMark CPU benchmarks, alongside strong memory bandwidth and database processing capabilities. With a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps, it provides a balanced resource profile for demanding applications. The m6id.32xlarge is highly suited for large-scale database deployments, software compilation, static web serving, and parallel enterprise workloads requiring high-speed local storage.

tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, massive local NVMe storage, and high-speed multi-core processing.

512 GB of DDR4 memory and 7600 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and strong memory bandwidth capabilities
